---
title: "Git — Version Control for Regulated Teams"
description: "Version control for reproducible analysis, pipelines, and collaborative clinical programming."
toc-depth: 2
---

::: {.callout-important}
**Status: Coming soon** — Full tutorial in progress. Start with [Docker](docker.qmd) if you need reproducible environments today.
:::

## 1. Introduction

**Git** tracks changes to code, scripts, Dockerfiles, and Quarto documents — essential for audit trails and team collaboration.

### Why Git matters in pharma and bioinformatics

- Reproducible analysis scripts under change control
- Code review before production pipeline releases
- Linking commits to validated container tags

[Back to home](index.qmd)
